title: Windows Forensics: File Server Pre-Ransomware — Live PowerShell
description: FS-CORP-01 fired vssadmin delete shadows ten minutes ago and Finance reports `.l0ck0kk3d` extensions. Walk the live REDACTED/Sysmon log, the staging dir, and the share to reconstruct the lateral-to-encryption-prep chain.

hints.text: `connect fs-corp-01`. Start with `Get-WinEvent -LogName REDACTED | include 4624` to find the lateral logon.
`Get-WinEvent -LogName REDACTED | include vssadmin` shows the shadow-copy delete. `Get-CimInstance Win32_ShadowCopy` confirms the impact.
`Get-ChildItem C:\Staging` reveals the dropped binary; `Get-Service` shows the persistence wrapper service.
